application_id.description: Id of the application this stage entry belongs to.

job_interview_stage_id.description: Id of the interview stage occupied during this entry. References a `/v3/job_interview_stages` row scoped to the application's job.

entered_at.description: Timestamp the application entered this stage, in ISO 8601. `null` only for backfilled or partially recorded history.

exited_at.description: Timestamp the application left this stage, in ISO 8601. `null` while the application is still in this stage (the current stage entry).

days_in_stage.description: Whole number of calendar days the application has spent in this stage, computed as `exited_at - entered_at` for past stages and `now - entered_at` for the current stage.

current.description: `true` when this row represents the application's current interview stage; `false` for past stage entries in the candidate's history.

description: Schema for the 'application_stages' stream, linked to the '/v3/application_stages' endpoint.
